title: Infused Yeasty Chiapan Persian Cucumber Burrito
description: A dense and savory weeknight burrito featuring a mortar-pounded Persian cucumber relish and a rich nutritional yeast-infused bean filling.

ingredients.name: Nutritional yeast
ingredients.notes: To provide the savory yeasty profile

ingredients.name: Queso de Cuadro
ingredients.notes: Crumpled chiapan cheese or feta substitute

instructions: Place the garlic and toasted chipotle pepper in a mortar and pestle and pound into a thick paste.
Add the Persian cucumber slices to the mortar and lightly pound until bruised and released of their juices.
Stir the lime juice into the cucumber mixture and set aside to marinate.
Heat the black beans in a small saucepan over medium heat until steaming.
Stir the nutritional yeast into the beans until the mixture becomes thick and smells savory.
Lay a warm tortilla flat and spread a generous layer of the yeasty bean mixture down the center.
Top the beans with a portion of the pounded cucumber relish and crumbled cheese.
Drizzle the Mexican crema over the filling components.
Fold the sides of the tortilla inward and roll tightly into a dense burrito.
Sear the burrito in a dry skillet for one minute per side to seal the seam.
